infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Potholes needs camera access to take photos and videos of road damage.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Potholes needs photo library access to select existing photos of road damage.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Potholes needs your location to pin pothole reports on the map.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Potholes needs microphone access to record audio with video reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Potholes needs your location to pin pothole reports on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: Potholes needs photo library access to select existing photos of road damage.
plugins.cameraPermission: Potholes needs camera access to take photos and videos of road damage.
